title: ornithoxanthum bohemicum
intro: Ornithoxanthum bohemicum, also known as Bohemian sundew, is a type of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, characterized by its unique, glandular leaves that capture and digest insects for nutrients. The medicinal properties of Ornithoxanthum bohemicum lie in its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can aid in the healing of wounds and prevent infection. Herbal preparations of Ornithoxanthum bohemicum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a variety of forms.
